PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSLER, DEBRA B IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CHRISTOPHER T STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WILLIAMS, CHRISTOPHER T RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ROSLER, DEBRA B $80.87 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $95.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
